name: Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a late clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering cell therapy for the treatment of autoimmune diseases. Descartes-08, our lead cell therapy product candidate, is an autologous CAR-T product targeting B-cell maturation antigen (BCMA) in clinical development for the treatment of MG and myositis. Unlike DNA, mRNA degrades naturally over time without integrating into the cell's genetic material.

exposures.sentence: We are a late clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering cell therapy for the treatment of autoimmune diseases.

As we advance our pipeline, we continue to evaluate the potential of enhanced delivery platforms for our cell therapies with multiple feasibility studies underway to explore the potential timing for optimizing in-vivo delivery of our assets currently in development.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 AURORA trial of Descartes-08 in MG
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we initiated our Phase 3 AURORA trial of Descartes-08 in patients with MG.

catalysts.event: FDA Special Protocol Assessment agreement for AURORA trial
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we received written agreement from the FDA under the Special Protocol Assessment, or SPA, process on the overall design of our planned AURORA trial.

catalysts.event: Start of Phase 2 trial in myositis
catalysts.sentence: We expect to commence this trial in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2 pediatric basket trial in JDM
catalysts.sentence: The initiation of the Phase 2 pediatric basket trial was announced in January 2026.

tamClaims.claim: MG is estimated to affect over 106,000 patients in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated to affect over 106,000 patients in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Myositis impacts approximately 80,000 people in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: Myositis impacts approximately 80,000 people in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: JDM impacts approximately 4,000 people in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: JDM impacts approximately 4,000 people in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: approximately three million adults worldwide are estimated to have SLE.
tamClaims.sentence: approximately three million adults worldwide are estimated to have SLE.
